reason: Confirms placement: about_screen.dart under features/settings/presentation/screens/, app_info constants under core/constants/, and first-time enablement of assets/ folder — must follow feature-first + core layering.

AboutScreen and SettingsScreen widget structure: const constructors, prop ordering, Scaffold + AppBar shape, ListTile/Card MD3 usage, Image.asset rounded-corner pattern (ClipRRect), and color sourcing from theme.colorScheme / textTheme.
Decision basis for PackageInfo async read: FutureBuilder for one-shot async vs Riverpod FutureProvider; where side-effect URL launches live (widget callback vs controller).
About page on desktop/web needs WindowSizeClass-based max content width so it doesn't stretch full-bleed; keep parity with existing settings branch responsive strategy.
url_launcher failure path (no browser / canLaunchUrl false) must surface a user-visible Chinese SnackBar via ScaffoldMessenger per the project's error-translation conventions.

Adding package_info_plus + url_launcher requires version-constraint discipline and may need iOS Info.plist (LSApplicationQueriesSchemes) / Android <queries> manifest entries — must follow this spec when touching platform configs.
PackageInfo.fromPlatform() returns a Future and buildNumber can be an empty string on web; null-safe / empty-safe handling required when composing the v{version}+{build} label.
